titleStmt.title: SII 38.343: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 343. (A.R. No. 343 of 1912.) ŚŌḺAPURAM, VELLORE TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the south base, ruined Śiva temple.

summary.p: Records that Śeṅgēṇi Ammaiyappan Kaṇṇuḍai Perumāḷ alias Vikramachōḻa Sambhuvarāyar assigned the taxes such as antarāyam, veṭṭi and śilvari infavour of the temple of Rājarājēśvaram-uḍaiyar of Uyyakkoṇḍāṉ-Śōḻapuram and other adjoining temples of the village (ivvūr puṟattaḷigaḷilum). It seems that he remitted these taxes in accordance with the royal order.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvanaccakkaravarttikaḷ koneriṉmai(ḷa)koṇṭa kulottuṅkacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 10āvatuThe letter tu is written below the previous letter vaceṅkeṇi
Ammaiyappan kaṇṇuṭaipperumāḷāṉa vikkiramacoḻac campuvarāyanen Uyyakkoṇṭāṉcoḻapurattu Āḷuṭaiyār
rājarājiśvaramuṭaiyārkoyilum Ivvūr puṟattaḷikaḷilum Aṉtarāyamum veṭṭi taniyāḷuḷḷiṭṭa cilvari kaṇatevar
kke viṭṭen Ivaṉ piṟakāḻvāṉ keṅkaiyiṭaikkumariyiṭaik kurāṟpacuvaik konṟān pāvattaip paṭuvā
n śrīmāheśvararakṣai .Another inscription of earlier characters is found engraved below this. It runs as follows. 1 ciya • . 2 kku āmaraṅkuḻa devabhogam veṇṭumeṉṟu sabhaiyārai veṇṭa sabhaiyomumeṅkaḷ periyaveri nir kiḻkaḻaṉikku 2 pāñca kāliṉ vaṭakkileḻumāvu mitaṉoṭuṭaiyañca teṟkil icaṉṉiṟc ceṟuvumākat taṭiyiraṇṭumiḻampūr co- 3 maṭi ayyaṉum caṉṉayaṉumuṭaiya iṉṉicceṟuvil kiḻaik kāṭeṟu taṭiyiraṇṭumākat taṭi nālumuḷḷiṭṭu [ca] 4 bheyo innilattāl vanta iṟaiyu meccoṟum nirvilaiyum poṉṉum amañci veṭṭiyu maṟṟu mu[ḷḷi][ṭṭa*]na • • tiyamu
Digital edition of SII 38.343 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
